items.title: Revenue Operations Control Tower: operating discovery
items.name: Revenue Operations Control Tower: operating discovery
items.summary: Earlier discovery established the first internal revenue-operations control-tower pattern that later became part of the broader merged internal model.
items.opportunity: Clarify how far this initiative should scale in the next planning cycle and which narrower slice is most worth accelerating.

linkedInitiatives.description: Historical discovery for the original revenue operations initiative.

assignments.how: Owns discovery framing, synthesis, and recommendation.
Adds implementation, data, or domain evidence needed to resolve the main risks.

riskFocus.question: Will the target users adopt this workflow over the current workaround?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Adoption improves when the workflow materially reduces manual coordination and makes outcomes more predictable.
evidenceToCollect: Which outcome change is strong enough to alter behavior.

riskFocus.question: Can target users complete the workflow without excessive assistance?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Users can complete the redesigned flow with less ambiguity than the current state.
evidenceToCollect: Which states or messages remain unclear.

riskFocus.question: Can the teams deliver and operate the workflow without excessive custom work?
riskFocus.hypothesis: The workflow can scale if reuse remains high and exceptions stay controlled.
evidenceToCollect: What can stay standardized versus localized.

plannedActivities: Replay the current end-to-end workflow with real stakeholders.
Test alternative routing, approval, and visibility states.
Measure wait time removed, rework avoided, and confidence gained.
items.decisionToMake: Decide the smallest scalable slice that should move into delivery next.

items.title: Demand Engine Control Tower: operating discovery
items.name: Demand Engine Control Tower: operating discovery
items.summary: Earlier discovery tested whether demand-engine workflow improvements could increase pipeline quality before the broader merged domain structure existed.
